description:
AI-native developer terminal built on Tauri and Rust

Gear is a fast, lightweight developer terminal built on Tauri and Rust. It combines a native PTY backend with an integrated AI assistant, code editor, file explorer, and source control panel.
0.1.2 (2026-07-04)
Features
- add built-in wallpaper gallery and background personalization (757c345)
- add Explain/Refactor/Fix quick-action presets to AI selection popup (2b8c8fd)
- add ShortcutIds for pane close, zen mode, terminal clear, editor commands (1b10182)
- add unsplit pane (Ctrl+Shift+W) and close-other-tabs context menu (7935a43)
- add website link to About, i18n update dialog, remove stale Arch/winget artifacts (281cb3d)
- add word wrap toggle and rectangular selection to code editor (ab3aa55)
- chronicle: engine spine + capture commands (80816c1)
- chronicle: git + agent capture, file history, sandbox checkout (7a1a8db)
- chronicle: terminal command capture via OSC 133 (d8160cc)
- editor: inline media preview (image/video/audio/PDF) (04bb070)
- editor: markdown-rendered-default + per-tab language override (aa673f3)
- editor: Swift, Vue, Twig syntax + all Dockerfile variants (a7dc2f9)
- explorer: accept files dropped from the OS (3025e9c)
- fs: fuzzy file search (subsequence, path-aware, smart-case) (94a6bd6)
- lsp: adopt LSP subsystem (Rust language server host) (242551f)
- platform: macOS entitlements + press-and-hold, editor zoom, Linux clipboard (c9cbb57)
- port command palette, window title, SCM context menu, explorer active-file highlight (b43ea2b)
- restore Arch option in Linux update dialog (b179e75)
- rewind: agent capture, blame-across-time, sandbox checkout UI (af9e6c1)
- rewind: diff stats in blame view + sandbox GC in retention (8d6bf93)
- rewind: open created sandbox in file explorer (0e0bd9e)
- rewind: restore-all to promote a whole point-in-time to live (b8e1c11)
- rewind: timeline full-text search + retention pruning UI (27ca8fd)
- rewind: timeline UI + file-capture wiring (a770607)
- settings pane refactor, AI mini window geometry, fs watching, and managed agents (2d8695f)
- settings: add terminal cursor-blink toggle (dfbe3f9)
- settings: terminal font-weight picker (44aa0f4)
- spaces: activate in-session spaces (switcher, filtering, move) (2c3bfba)
- spaces: persist spaces across restarts (additive, defensive) (6b507e6)
- spaces: scaffold spaces module + tab/workspace/settings primitives (6d8cfb1)
- surface duplicate/move/delete/comment line shortcuts in dialog (already handled by CM defaultKeymap) (2616f0c)
- sync 14 upstream commits from terax-ai (5308a3e)
- tabs: make block-mode terminal reachable (dropdown + Cmd+Shift+T) (3dbe56f)
- terminal: adopt upstream block-mode terminal + reliability, keep Gear branding (18fe87e)
- terminal: port file-drop, close-confirm, and tab-rename from terax-ai (eb7e950)
- terminal: restore pane-level rename on split panes (404885e)
- terminal: unified Shell/AI input bar, block shell picker, and command history (97e7266)
- theme: live theme preview on hover (253e1b6)
- window: confirm quit while a terminal process is running (eeefa9f)
- zen mode, sidebar position toggle, terminal clear shortcut (532bfa0)
Bug Fixes
- correct AUR package name to gear-terminal-bin (0724138)
- linux: strip AppImage env from spawned shells (8f37c7f)
- lsp: age-guard idle eviction against concurrent multi-root opens (4ffa69b)
- media: allow http://asset.localhost in CSP so images load on Windows (21bc405)
- media: limit preview to formats WebView2 can decode (77beadf)
- preserve left terminal content when splitting panes (7d29a81)
- pty: reap session on child exit to free stranded pseudoconsole (b0b03a0)
- pty: reply to pwsh startup cursor query so new tabs don't hang blank (fba6d1d)
- replace minimal-1 wallpaper with cleaner minimal interior shot (c117f64)
- settings: register new prefs in the change-listener key map (cd38fae)
- spaces/editor: tabs open in active space; more media types; drag across spaces (bd4675f)
- terminal layout, OSC re-registration, and configurable split focus (3410ddd)
- terminal: honor per-tab shell picker; add pane close button (be07342)
- terminal: make cursor-blink toggle take visible effect (6479352)
- terminal: permanently fix blank/unresponsive terminal on open (84efc92)
- window: close via titlebar X and Alt+F4 (9f0ce26)
